# Spacer Bar Gossip: Unreliable Intelligence Report

[Source reliability: LOW — unverified barroom conversation, Terminus Station]

Overheard at the Stellar Drift cantina, two traders discussing the Alpha-7 corridor:

"I'm telling you, the Alpha-7 route is haunted. My nav computer went completely sideways near the Crab Nebula — started plotting courses to places that don't exist. Three ships have gone missing in that sector in the last standard year."

"That's nothing. I heard the Foundation has a secret base at one of the Alpha-7 jump points. They're testing some new kind of drive — makes the Improbability Drive look like a bicycle."

"You've had too many Gargleblasters, mate."

[Note: This intelligence has not been verified by any official source. The claims about missing ships contradict Spacers' Guild transit records, which show no anomalies on the Alpha-7 corridor in the referenced period.]
